overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk, walks under a concrete overpass, and continues through dense urban streets with holographic advertisements and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with neon-lit crosswalk

events.description: character begins walking forward across the yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking across a broad yellow and black striped crosswalk in a futuristic city at night

notable_agents.action: futuristic yellow sports car parked at the curb waiting
two pedestrians walking ahead across the street in the same direction

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black stripes
tall pole with multiple spotlights and holographic display attachments
tall building with illuminated windows and blue neon signage near the top
distant glowing advertisements and building lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city intersection at night. The character walks across a prominent yellow-striped crosswalk toward a towering office building with blue neon accents. A yellow sports car is parked on the right, and two pedestrians walk ahead in the distance. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway structure

events.description: character enters covered area beneath massive concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking under a concrete overpass with neon-lit storefronts visible in the background

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing distinctive purple bodysuit and white hat walking toward camera

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and beams of elevated roadway or monorail track
illuminated blue street sign reading PERRIN mounted on a pole
construction barriers with yellow and black diagonal stripes
scattered cardboard boxes and litter on the wet concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open intersection into a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. A street sign reading PERRIN is visible on the left. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with construction barriers on the right and scattered debris on the wet ground. A pedestrian in a purple outfit walks past in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with traffic barriers approaching major intersection

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area into open street with visible sky
character continues straight as the street widens approaching the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward a large illuminated billboard and busy intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: massive illuminated screen displaying white logo against dark background
yellow and black striped metal barriers lining the edge of the street
illuminated red street sign reading MUREN becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into an open street lined with traffic barriers. A massive digital billboard glows in the distance at the end of the street. The wet sidewalk reflects the surrounding neon lights from buildings on the right. The character follows a pedestrian in a yellow jacket toward the approaching intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with neon storefronts and active vehicle traffic

events.description: futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection from left to right
character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a busy intersection surrounded by neon-lit buildings and moving traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on
pedestrian in dark clothing waiting at the corner near a neon sign

entered.detail: yellow-striped pedestrian crossing at the busy intersection
bright red and orange illuminated signs for ground-level businesses
modern skyscraper with grid-patterned illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the busy intersection marked by a MUREN street sign. The scene opens into a wide intersection with bright neon storefronts on the right and tall glass buildings. The character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk as futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection. The environment is densely packed with illuminated advertisements and architectural details typical of a cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from an open intersection into a claustrophobic underpass before emerging back into a sprawling urban hub. It begins with the character crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk toward a blue-accented office building, where wet pavement reflects the surrounding glow and a yellow sports car sits parked nearby. As the character moves forward, the environment shifts from the open street into the dark, enclosed space beneath a massive concrete overpass marked by a Perrin street sign and scattered debris. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the shadows, following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket toward a distant, glowing digital billboard. Finally, the camera reaches a wide, bustling intersection at Muren, where the view expands to reveal bright neon storefronts and towering glass buildings as futuristic vehicles stream past.
